event: Sunset over a flat plain with pine trees
description: A vertical landscape showing a vast sky above a flat dark plain. A cluster of tall, thin pine trees stands silhouetted against a soft pink and orange sunset at the horizon. A flock of small birds flies across the pale blue upper sky. A wisp of white smoke rises from the dark ground at center right. The foreground is very dark earth and low vegetation. The sky dominates the composition, transitioning from warm pink at the horizon through pale blue to a cooler tone above.
